steps.title: Getting Started with Surgewave
steps.text: This guide walks you through installing Surgewave, starting a broker, and sending your first messages. Follow along step by step.

steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.text: Make sure you have .NET 10 SDK installed. Surgewave runs on Windows, Linux, and macOS with no external dependencies required.

steps.title: More Quickstart Topics
steps.text: Check the sidebar for additional quickstart topics like sending your first messages and configuring producers and consumers.

steps.title: Next Steps
steps.text: Once you have Surgewave running, explore the Features section for advanced capabilities like Streams processing, Connect framework, and Schema Registry.
